tasks.title: Infrastructure and Environment Setup
tasks.description: Initialize the Android project directory structure and configure build dependencies, plugins, and Node.js backend environment configurations.
tasks.notes: Infrastructure initialized. Kotlin 1.9.22, Gradle 8.2, target SDK 34, Node 20 LTS runtime setup complete.

tasks.title: Database Entities & Room Schema Configuration
tasks.description: Formally declare Room entities, primary/foreign keys, unique constraints, and initial mock database builders for the local SQLite cache database.
tasks.notes: All 6 Room entities declared per Database_Schema.md §2. AppDatabase registered with SQLCipher SupportFactory + PRAGMA secure_delete=ON. ON DELETE CASCADE/SET NULL FK constraints implemented. Schema integration tests written covering IT-SYNC-01 (partial) and all FK cascade behaviors.

tasks.title: Local Cryptography & Secure Storage Setup
tasks.description: Initialize SQLCipher database encryption at rest and implement the Android Keystore CryptographyHelper for AES-256-GCM in-memory operations.
tasks.notes: KeystoreManager generates 256-bit AES-GCM keys in hardware-backed TEE. CryptographyHelper implements AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt with 12-byte IV prepended to ciphertext. DatabaseModule wires Keystore key → passphrase derivation → AppDatabase SupportFactory with immediate passphrase zeroing. 14 unit tests written covering Testing_Strategy.md Part 1 §1 happy/boundary/invalid/perf cases.

tasks.title: Google Authentication & User Registration
tasks.description: Implement Google Sign-In via Android Credential Manager API on the client, and custom JWT authentication gates on the backend gateway.
tasks.notes: LoginActivity (SCR-ONB-01) wired to Credential Manager API with FLAG_SECURE, ANDROID_ID device binding. AuthApiService + SecureHttpClient (TLS 1.3 + cert pinning). Backend authController verifies Google JWT via Firebase Admin, enforces 3-device limit, upserts user + device_sessions. authMiddleware covers all protected routes. 8 IT-AUTH-01 backend tests written.

tasks.title: Security Question Setup & Challenge
tasks.description: Configure the security question registration interface during onboarding, hashed response verification APIs, and administrative gatekeep tokens.
tasks.notes: PBKDF2-SHA256 hasher with 100k iterations, constant-time verify, trim+lowercase normalization. SCR-ONB-02 with 15 predefined questions. SCR-ATH-01 with adaptive delay and challenge token return. Backend securityController with Joi validation, PBKDF2 re-derivation, HMAC challenge tokens. 13 unit + integration tests covering IT-AUTH-03/04.

tasks.title: PIN Creation & Unlock Verification
tasks.description: Implement local PIN setup workflows, database seeding, daily app lockscreen overlays, and biometric fallback prompts.
tasks.notes: PinHasher: PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 100k iterations, 16-byte salt, 64-char hex key matching Database_Schema.md CHECK constraint. PinCreateActivity: two-phase enter+confirm flow, hash written to SQLCipher DB. PinUnlockActivity: < 100ms verify gate, back exits app, Professional variant header, delegates lockout to task-007. 17 unit tests.

tasks.title: PIN Lockout State Sync & Delay Enforcement
tasks.description: Implement progressive delays, lockout countdown overlays, local DB persistency, and cloud synchronization APIs for failed PIN attempts.

tasks.title: Backup Code Recovery & PIN Resets
tasks.description: Establish backup recovery code validation, single-use logic, code regeneration settings interfaces, and server verification APIs.
tasks.notes: backupController.js: SHA-256 single-use verify, HMAC challenge token return, regenerate with optional challengeToken gate. BackupCodesActivity.kt: SCR-ONB-04 display + copy flow. PIN reset integration in PinCreateActivity/LockoutActivity. 9 Jest integration tests (IT-AUTH-06/07) all passing.

tasks.title: Biometric Integration & Enrollment Checks
tasks.description: Implement biometric enrollment validation, Keystore dynamic key invalidation, settings triggers, and fallback challenge configurations.
tasks.notes: BiometricHelper.kt: CryptoObject-bound BiometricPrompt, KeyPermanentlyInvalidatedException handling, SharedPreferences toggle state. SecuritySettingsActivity.kt: SCR-SET-02 with biometric/autofill switches, change PIN and regenerate codes actions. PinUnlockActivity.kt: biometric prompt on resume when enabled, confirmation mode for settings PIN check. 8 JVM unit tests for sealed class contracts.

tasks.title: Categories Management
tasks.description: Establish predefined database category seeds, custom categories CRUD endpoints, list UI interfaces, and soft-delete migration logic.
tasks.notes: CategoryDao.kt: Room DAO with CRUD, duplicate check, password count, seed helper, programmatic ON DELETE SET NULL. categoryController.js: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with Joi validation, uid-scoped, default seeding, duplicate guard, default deletion guard. CategoriesActivity.kt: SCR-VLT-04 RecyclerView list. categoryController.test.js: 13 tests (IT-VAULT-06/07/08/09) all passing. 48/48 total.

tasks.title: Credentials CRUD Operations
tasks.description: Implement vault credential details creation layouts, AES-256 local encrypted storage updates, detail reveal actions, and soft-delete trash pathways.
tasks.notes: VaultDao.kt: Full CRUD + search + favorites + soft-delete/restore/purge + password history. vaultController.js: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with Joi, uid-scoping, version increment, password history on update, soft delete. AddEditCredentialActivity.kt: SCR-VLT-02 with AES-256-GCM encryption via VMK. CredentialDetailsActivity.kt: SCR-VLT-03 with reveal/copy/30s clipboard clear, delete to trash, password history. 11 integration tests (IT-VAULT-01/02/03/04) passing. 59/59 total.

tasks.title: Credentials History Tracking
tasks.description: Implement the local database password history collection, update hooks tracking changes, and details history listing interfaces.
tasks.notes: HistoryDao.kt: Dedicated DAO with insert, getLastThree, purgeOldestBeyondLimit (subquery), archiveAndPurge convenience. AddEditCredentialActivity: Fixed to only archive when password actually changes (edge case). CredentialDetailsActivity: Per-item Eye Icon reveal toggle for history entries. AppDatabase: historyDao() registered. No API changes. 59/59 backend tests still passing.

tasks.title: Clipboard Security & Details Actions
tasks.description: Configure copy action handlers, system clipboard writing helpers, and background auto-clear timeouts.
tasks.notes: SecureClipboardManager.kt: singleton wrapper with copyPassword/copyUsername/copyWebsite, label-based 30s auto-clear via Handler + ClipboardClearService safety net. ClipboardClearService.kt: background service with START_NOT_STICKY, label comparison before clear. CredentialDetailsActivity: refactored to use SecureClipboardManager, added Copy Username and Copy Website buttons. Layout updated with btn_copy_username, btn_copy_website. Service registered in AndroidManifest. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Main Dashboard UI & Favorites Top-Sorting
tasks.description: Construct the main dashboard listing layout, bottom navigation bars, search anchors, and SQLCipher favorites sorting algorithms.
tasks.notes: DashboardActivity.kt (SCR-VLT-01): RecyclerView with favorites-first sorting, FAB→AddEdit, card tap→Details, bottom nav (Dashboard/Categories/Settings), search filter, Loading/Empty/Content states. CredentialAdapter.kt: DiffUtil-based ListAdapter with letter avatar, name, username, star. VaultDao: getDashboardCredentials (ORDER BY favorite DESC, name ASC). Layout XMLs: activity_dashboard, item_credential, bottom_nav_menu, circle_avatar_bg. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Real-Time Debounced Vault Search
tasks.description: Implement the real-time search filtering layout on the dashboard with a 100ms debounce buffer to prevent input UI lag.
tasks.notes: DashboardViewModel.kt: Flow-based 100ms debounce via Flow.debounce() + flatMapLatest, DashboardState sealed class (Loading/Content/Empty/Error). DashboardActivity: refactored to ViewModel observation via repeatOnLifecycle, removed inline filtering. VaultDao.searchCredentials: updated to sort favorites-first (ORDER BY favorite DESC, name ASC), added spec refs. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Password Generator & Complexity Options
tasks.description: Construct high-entropy random generation services, complexity toggle configurations, length sliders, and zxcvbn strength meters.
tasks.notes: PasswordGenerator.kt: SecureRandom-based generator with configurable toggles (upper/lower/numbers/symbols/exclude-similar), length 8-64, character diversity enforcement. PasswordStrengthAnalyzer.kt: zxcvbn-style local scoring (0-4 levels, entropy estimation, pattern penalties). GeneratorActivity.kt (SCR-GEN-01): length slider, 5 toggles, real-time strength meter, Copy (SecureClipboardManager), Use Password (returns to AddEdit). Bottom nav updated with Generator tab. AddEditCredentialActivity: Generate button now launches GeneratorActivity. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Password Health Dashboard & Duplicate Detection
tasks.description: Create background scanning engines analyzing local vault records, duplicate reuse alerts on saving, and health dashboards.
tasks.notes: VaultHealthAuditor.kt: strength distribution counting (weak/medium/strong), reuse detection via encrypted value comparison, recommendation generator. HealthDashboardActivity.kt (SCR-GEN-02): stats cards, dynamic recommendation cards with offending entry lists, all-good/empty states. AddEditCredentialActivity.kt: duplicate detection on save with MaterialAlertDialog warning, performSave/performSaveInternal extraction. DashboardActivity toolbar menu for health access. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Android Autofill Service Integration
tasks.description: Implement the Android native AutofillService interface, suggestions dropdown overlays, and target app identifier mappings.
tasks.notes: VaultAutofillService.kt: extends AutofillService, 4-strategy node parsing (autofill hints, HTML attrs, view IDs, InputType), credential query with package-based matching, FillResponse with RemoteViews datasets, on-the-fly password decryption. autofill_service_config.xml, item_autofill_suggestion.xml layout. AndroidManifest: BIND_AUTOFILL_SERVICE permission + intent-filter + meta-data. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Secure PDF Export Generation
tasks.description: Construct native PdfDocument generation, password-protection formatting, security question validation gates, and system share sheet triggers.
tasks.notes: PdfExportHelper.kt: native PdfDocument API, A4 pages with dark bg, credential fields (Name/Username/Password/URL), pagination. ExportActivity.kt: 2-step flow (security question SHA-256 verification → PDF password input → generate → Share Sheet via FileProvider). SPEC DEVIATION: Android PdfDocument has no encryption API — PDF generated unencrypted; flagged for iText library integration. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Plaintext CSV Export
tasks.description: Build CSV formatted text generation, plaintext warning alerts, security question validation gates, and system share sheet triggers.
tasks.notes: CsvExportHelper.kt: RFC 4180 compliant CSV with proper escaping (commas, quotes, newlines). ExportActivity.kt refactored to support dual PDF/CSV modes via EXTRA_EXPORT_TYPE. CSV flow shows MaterialAlertDialog plaintext warning before generation per F-EXP-02 AC#2, SRS FR-EXP-02b. Extracted shared fetchAndDecryptCredentials and parameterized openShareSheet. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Sync Queue Logging & WorkManager Scheduling
tasks.description: Establish local database sync queue tracking, transaction loggers, WorkManager connectivity sync tasks, and retry protocols.
tasks.notes: SyncQueueDao.kt: Room DAO with insert, getPending/Failed, deleteById/byIds, markFailed, resetFailedToPending. SyncQueueManager.kt: typed log methods for credential/category CRUD with application-layer CHECK constraint enforcement. SyncWorker.kt: CoroutineWorker with NetworkType.CONNECTED constraints, 15-min periodic schedule, exponential backoff, POST /v1/sync push, success cleanup / failure marking. AppDatabase.kt: syncQueueDao() registered. 59/59 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Serverless Gateway APIs & Conflict Resolution
tasks.description: Build Firebase Functions API handlers, MongoDB Atlas connection gateways, hybrid conflict resolvers, and write logs collections.
tasks.notes: syncController.js: POST /v1/sync with hybrid conflict resolution (version counter + timestamp comparison per F-SYNC-03 AC#1/2/3). INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE handlers, uid-scoped queries, Joi validation, soft-delete for vault_passwords/hard-delete for categories, remote updates since lastSyncTime. syncController.test.js: 16 tests covering IT-SYNC-01, ST-STRIDE-06, ST-STRIDE-09, conflict resolver unit tests. index.js: route registered. 75/75 tests passing.

tasks.title: Multi-Device Limits & Session Logs
tasks.description: Implement the concurrent devices limitation APIs, active devices screens, and session revocation controllers.
tasks.notes: deviceController.js: GET /v1/devices (list sessions), DELETE /v1/devices/{id} (revoke/hard-delete), POST /v1/devices/register (3-device limit check + session creation). ActiveDevicesActivity.kt: RecyclerView with Device Name, Android Version, Last Active, Current Device badge, forced mode for login limit. deviceController.test.js: 9 tests covering IT-DEV-01, IT-DEV-02, registration + limit enforcement. 84/84 tests passing.

tasks.title: Compromised Environment Startup Warnings
tasks.description: Write native client check wrappers searching superuser root access files and active USB debugging developer states.
tasks.notes: EnvironmentChecker.kt: root detection (su/busybox/magisk binary paths, root app packages, test-keys build tags), USB debugging detection (Settings.Global.ADB_ENABLED), emulator detection. EnvWarningActivity.kt: SCR-ATH-05 warning screen with Loading/Warning states, root card, debug card, Continue Anyway button to SCR-ATH-02. 84/84 backend tests passing.

tasks.title: Unified Testing Suite Execution
tasks.description: Initialize integrated Client and Server testing suites, execute automated validation checks, and verify complete PRD coverage.
tasks.notes: api.test.js: 16 unified tests covering IT-AUTH-02 (VMK retrieval), IT-VAULT-05 (trash empty), ST-STRIDE-01 through ST-STRIDE-09 (STRIDE security audit), UAT-STUDENT-01 through UAT-GENERAL-01. VaultUITest.kt: 18 Espresso tests covering all SCR-* screens, FLAG_SECURE compliance, design token verification. Final result: 100/100 backend tests passing across 9 test suites. ALL 19 IT-IDs, 9 ST-IDs, 4 UAT-IDs covered.
